description: Single machine-readable source of truth for the zh-TW PRC-terminology lint. The human-readable table in .agents/skills/maintain-i18n/references/terminology.md references this file. 'error' terms always fail; 'warn' terms have a valid TW sense and need manual review (suppress a false positive with an HTML comment on the preceding line: <!-- i18n-lint-disable-next-line <term> -->). 'simplifiedChars' is a curated seed of simplified-only characters (zero-dependency grep); upgrade path is an opencc round-trip, not a launch dependency.
